response: The head coach of the Georgia Tech football team that finished the regular season with the same record as the 1981 team was George O'Leary. O'Leary served as the interim head coach for Georgia Tech's football team in 2001 after George O'Leary resigned and only coached for one game, the 2001 Seattle Bowl against No. 11-ranked Stanford. He replaced Lewis as interim head coach for the remaining three games of the season.
